sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE filter_table (filter_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY filter_value;
SELECT id, parseDateTimeOrZero(date_string) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date != ANY (SELECT filter_value FROM filter_table);
SELECT id, parseDateTimeOrZero(date_string) AS parsed_date FROM test_dates WHERE parsed_date != ANY (SELECT filter_value FROM filter_table WHERE filter_value != '2023-01-01');
CREATE TABLE agg_table (category String, value UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY category;
SELECT category, AVG(value) FROM agg_table GROUP BY category HAVING AVG(value) != ANY (SELECT parseDateTimeOrZero('invalid-date'));
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_dates (temp_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY temp_date;
SELECT temp_date FROM temp_dates WHERE temp_date != ANY (SELECT parseDateTimeOrZero('2023-01-01') UNION ALL SELECT parseDateTimeOrZero('not-a-date'));
